name: TreeDiagram

unions.name: TreeOrientation
unions.comment: Direction of the tree from root to leaves

aliases.name: EdgeDrawer
aliases.comment: Alias for functions that draw edges between nodes

aliases.name: NodeDrawer
aliases.comment: Alias for functions that draw nodes

aliases.name: TreeLayout
aliases.comment:
Options to be passed to `draw` for laying out the tree:
  * orientation: direction of the tree from root to leaves.
  * levelHeight: vertical distance between parent and child nodes.
  * subtreeDistance: horizontal distance between subtrees.
  * siblingDistance: horizontal distance between siblings. This is usually set
    below `subtreeDistance` to produce a clearer distinction between sibling
    nodes and non-siblings on the same level of the tree.
  * padding: amount of space to leave around the edges of the diagram.
aliases.type: { orientation : TreeOrientation, levelHeight : Int, siblingDistance : Int, subtreeDistance : Int, padding : Int }

values.name: defaultTreeLayout
values.comment: A set of default values that should be modified to create your TreeLayout

values.name: draw
values.comment:
Draws the tree using the provided functions for drawings nodes and edges.
    TreeLayout contains some more options for positioning the tree.
values.type: TreeLayout -> NodeDrawer a -> EdgeDrawer -> Tree a -> Element

values.name: node
values.comment: Constructs a tree out of a root value and a list of subtrees
